description: Enum-subset refinement — narrowed exhaustiveness (§53.15). @role is typed Role oneOf([.Admin, .Editor]) even though Role has FOUR variants. A match covering exactly the subset {.Admin, .Editor} is EXHAUSTIVE — the exhaustiveness check narrows the variant set to the subset, so NOT covering .Viewer / .Guest does NOT fire E-MATCH-NOT-EXHAUSTIVE, and no arm is dead. The narrowing twin of refinement-subset-dead-arm-pos.
rationale: §53.15 the variant set V used by the exhaustiveness check denotes the SUBSET, not the base enum; covering exactly the subset is exhaustive and dead-arm-free.
